memory_entries.text: SQLite product datasets recurring schema: tables are grouped by suffix g1/g2/g3. Attribute data exists for g1 and g3 only (attrs_g1/items_g1, attrs_g3/items_g3). Discontinued manufacturer attribute key appears as 'Is Discontinued By Manufacturer' (case variants); discontinued values include 'Yes' and 'True'. Catalog average star rating is items_g*.avg_rtg (not fdbk_stats).
